summary.key_theme: 市場高度期待 Arista Networks 在 AI 基礎設施領域的強勁動能，儘管面臨高估值與地緣政治風險，但分析師普遍看好其財報表現。

bullish.title: Arista Networks' Q1 Results to Benefit From New Customers, Margin Resilience, Morgan Stanley Says
bullish.reason: 摩根士丹利指出 Arista 具備新客戶增長與利潤韌性，是推動財報超預期的關鍵因素。

bullish.title: Jim Cramer Says He “Would Buy Arista Networks”
bullish.reason: 知名財經評論員 Jim Cramer 公開背書，增強了散戶投資人對該股在財報前夕的信心。

bullish.title: How The Arista Networks (ANET) Narrative Is Shifting With AI Data Center Expectations
bullish.reason: 市場對 AI 資料中心需求預期提升，帶動該股公允價值估值上調至 180.33 美元。

bullish.title: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) Scores High Growth Momentum Setup with Strong Technical and Fundamental Ratings
bullish.reason: 技術面與基本面評級強勁，顯示營收與獲利加速成長的動能持續。

bullish.title: 3 Internet Software Stocks to Buy From a Prospering Industry
bullish.reason: 強調 Arista 受益於 AI 基礎設施的高需求，屬於產業龍頭配置首選。

bearish.title: Geopolitical Tensions And AI Contract Jitters Might Change The Case For Investing In Arista Networks (ANET)
bearish.reason: 地緣政治緊張與 AI 合約不確定性，可能對半導體與科技股造成回調壓力。

bearish.title: Arista Networks Q1 2026 Earnings Preview: AI Momentum Meets A High Bar
bearish.reason: 提醒投資人雖然 AI 動能強勁，但市場對財報預期過高，估值已處於偏高水平。

neutral.title: Option Volatility And Earnings Report For May 4 - 8
neutral.reason: 僅列出財報發布日程與選擇權波動率，屬於中性市場資訊。

neutral.title: ANET Earnings Play: Using Puts to Get Paid While You Wait
neutral.reason: 提供選擇權交易策略建議，不涉及公司基本面評價。
